comment: Synthetic CLL 2L post-1L acalabrutinib progression at 28 mo, BCL2-naive, no BTK-C481 mutation detected. Engine routes via ALGO-CLL-2L: step 1 false (no RF-CLL-POST-BTKI-C481-ACTIONABLE since C481-WT, no transformation) → step 2 true (RF-PRIOR-BTKI-PROGRESSION fires, no RF-CLL-VEN-RESISTANT-ACTIONABLE) → IND-CLL-2L-VENR-MURANO (Venetoclax + Rituximab fixed-duration 24-mo schedule, MURANO trial; 4-yr PFS 57%). Distinct from existing CLL cases: low_risk = 1L BTKi (acalabrutinib), high_risk = 1L VenO, post_btki_progression = 3L pirtobrutinib post-acal+post-FCR with C481-mut. This case = 2L VenR class-switch from BTKi without C481 resistance. Note brief calls for 'post-1L FCR or BR'; modern 2026 practice uses 1L BTKi → 2L VenR class-switch (mechanism-of-action), which is also MURANO-supported and yields cleaner step-2 engine routing.

primary_diagnosis.disease_entity: Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia — 2L post-acalabrutinib progression, BCL2-naive
